text: Oh no, we are so sorry for the trouble! Jagoan completely understands how stressful a delayed transfer can be. Don't worry, Jagoan will immediately connect you to our Transfer & Payments specialist team to track your transaction in real-time. Please hold on a moment!

Mohon maaf banget atas ketidaknyamanannya, Kak. Jagoan paham kalau masalah transferan belum masuk ini bikin khawatir. Tenang ya, Jagoan akan langsung hubungkan Kakak ke tim spesialis Transfer & Pembayaran untuk melacak transaksi Kakak secara real-time. Mohon ditunggu sebentar, ya.
